feedback.text: Greetings, I'm writing this to request that customers have protections against publishers from destroying video games. One such example, for me, is the title called "Colin McRae: Dirt 2", a racing game that was taken down (or "destroyed") 2013-11-25 due to licensing issues, it is a game that I wish to be able to play again but due to publisher interference, that's not plausible anymore. I hope that you take my feedback & request into consideration to include protections against publishers from destroying video games. Thank you for your time!
